arts.ttl: David Coote sacked after Jurgen Klopp remarks amid Leeds United yellow card allegations
arts.sum: It read: “ Leeds United are aware of the allegations regarding the conduct of a match official, involving our EFL Championship fixture with West Bromwich Albion in October 2019. Additionally, it was reported that he was under investigation by The Football Association for allegedly discussing issuing a yellow card prior to refereeing a Championship match between Leeds United and West Bromwich Albion in October 2019.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke gives “hopeless” verdict as he responds to Chris Wilder’s Leeds United comment
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has given his verdict on Chris Wilder’s latest comments on the club, speaking out about the Whites following Sheffield United’s draw v West Brom. At the moment, you’re not having to wait long at all between Chris Wilder comments about Leeds, speaking at length about the club during the summer and continuing it since as promotion rivals.

arts.ttl: Rav van den Berg, Lukas Engel, Marcus Forss - Boro injury update ahead of Leeds
arts.sum: Middlesbrough's injury picture has been boosted further this week by the returns of Rav van den Berg and Lukas Engel. The defensive duo have both now returned to training with the Boro group after recent injuries - with Engel joining in for the first time on Monday morning ahead of Tuesday's trip to Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke perfectly responds to Chris Wilder's Leeds United Championship admission
arts.sum: The Whites trail Wilder's Sheffield United outfit by a solitary point after 19 matches. I wouldn’t say we’re miles ahead of Burnley or Sheffield United, who were in the Premier League last season.

arts.ttl: Leeds team news: Bogle doubt, Firpo out for 4-6 weeks
arts.sum: Leeds United face another home clash this week with Middlesbrough up next at Elland Road, having beaten Derby County at the weekend. Meanwhile, right-back Jayden Bogle is also a doubt after hamstring pain himself following the match, with Farke suggesting it’s “more likely” he will miss the game than play it – there was no damage, but load management leaves him a doubt for tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Leeds United confirm extent of Junior Firpo's 'heart-breaking' injury amid new fitness concern
arts.sum: Farke said: "He was back in team training yesterday and will be available for this game if he comes through tomorrow." Boss Daniel Farke has confirmed Junior Firpo will definitely miss the clash through injury.

arts.ttl: Leeds United are outperforming every club in top four leagues including Liverpool
arts.sum: Sheffield United and Burnley have only conceded two and three goals, respectively, in nine home games, but have only scored 14 and 13 respectively. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: My wife got messages from tearful Leeds United diehards but 'life gave me signals' to leave
arts.sum: I hope they come back and we can see the Leeds games again in the Premier League next year and why not watch Leeds in Europe in a few years? "They never stopped supporting the team in the lower leagues and coming back to the Premier League was the place Leeds deserved to play after 16 years because they are a big club in England.

arts.ttl: No shots, hooked on 65′: Ipswich’s former wind-up merchant had stinker v Leeds United
arts.sum: Leeds United didn’t need to be at their brilliant best to sweep Derby County aside on Saturday, but it was another ideally dominant home performance where the away side did nothing to worry the Whites goal. Daniel Farke has to find a way to rectify Leeds’ questionable consistency away from home, but there is absolutely nothing wrong with what we’re seeing at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United chief Chris Wilder cranks up Leeds United mind games with 'miles ahead' claim
arts.sum: But speaking in his post-match press conference at The Hawthorns, Wilder said: “The chat in the week was we could swallow a defeat and it’s still a great start, but I told them I’m not having any of that. This (West Brom) is a big test for us, fabulous club, great squad of players and front four right up there.
